// src/app/services/ticket.service.ts
import { Injectable } from "/@fs/c:/All_Antigravity_Project_Workspace/antigravity-workspace-agentkit/frontend/.angular/cache/17.3.17/vite/deps/@angular_core.js?v=21cc5146";
import * as i0 from "/@fs/c:/All_Antigravity_Project_Workspace/antigravity-workspace-agentkit/frontend/.angular/cache/17.3.17/vite/deps/@angular_core.js?v=21cc5146";
import * as i1 from "/@fs/c:/All_Antigravity_Project_Workspace/antigravity-workspace-agentkit/frontend/.angular/cache/17.3.17/vite/deps/@angular_common_http.js?v=21cc5146";
var TicketService = class _TicketService {
  constructor(http) {
    this.http = http;
    this.apiUrl = "http://localhost:8080/api/tickets";
  }
  getTickets() {
    return this.http.get(this.apiUrl);
  }
  createTicket(ticket) {
    return this.http.post(this.apiUrl, ticket);
  }
  searchTickets(query) {
    return this.http.get(`${this.apiUrl}/search?query=${query}`);
  }
  static {
    this.\u0275fac = function TicketService_Factory(t) {
      return new (t || _TicketService)(i0.\u0275\u0275inject(i1.HttpClient));
    };
  }
  static {
    this.\u0275prov = /* @__PURE__ */ i0.\u0275\u0275defineInjectable({ token: _TicketService, factory: _TicketService.\u0275fac, providedIn: "root" });
  }
};

// src/app/components/ticket-search/ticket-search.component.ts
import { Component, Output, EventEmitter } from "/@fs/c:/All_Antigravity_Project_Workspace/antigravity-workspace-agentkit/frontend/.angular/cache/17.3.17/vite/deps/@angular_core.js?v=21cc5146";
import * as i02 from "/@fs/c:/All_Antigravity_Project_Workspace/antigravity-workspace-agentkit/frontend/.angular/cache/17.3.17/vite/deps/@angular_core.js?v=21cc5146";
var TicketSearchComponent = class _TicketSearchComponent {
  constructor(ticketService) {
    this.ticketService = ticketService;
    this.onSearch = new EventEmitter();
  }
  search(query) {
    if (query.length > 2) {
      this.ticketService.searchTickets(query).subscribe((data) => this.onSearch.emit(data));
    } else if (query.length === 0) {
      this.ticketService.getTickets().subscribe((data) => this.onSearch.emit(data));
    }
  }
  static {
    this.\u0275fac = function TicketSearchComponent_Factory(t) {
      return new (t || _TicketSearchComponent)(i02.\u0275\u0275directiveInject(TicketService));
    };
  }
  static {
    this.\u0275cmp = /* @__PURE__ */ i02.\u0275\u0275defineComponent({ type: _TicketSearchComponent, selectors: [["app-ticket-search"]], outputs: { onSearch: "onSearch" }, decls: 5, vars: 0, consts: [[1, "relative", "group"], [1, "absolute", "inset-y-0", "left-0", "pl-3", "flex", "items-center", "pointer-events-none"], ["fill", "none", "stroke", "currentColor", "viewBox", "0 0 24 24", 1, "h-5", "w-5", "text-slate-500", "group-focus-within:text-blue-500"], ["stroke-linecap", "round", "stroke-linejoin", "round", "stroke-width", "2", "d", "M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z"], ["type", "text", "placeholder", "Search tickets...", 1, "bg-white/5", "border", "border-white/10", "rounded-full", "pl-10", "pr-4", "py-2", "text-sm", "text-white", "focus:outline-none", "focus:ring-2", "focus:ring-blue-500/50", "w-64", "transition-all", 3, "input"]], template: function TicketSearchComponent_Template(rf, ctx) {
      if (rf & 1) {
        i02.\u0275\u0275elementStart(0, "div", 0)(1, "div", 1);
        i02.\u0275\u0275namespaceSVG();
        i02.\u0275\u0275elementStart(2, "svg", 2);
        i02.\u0275\u0275element(3, "path", 3);
        i02.\u0275\u0275elementEnd()();
        i02.\u0275\u0275namespaceHTML();
        i02.\u0275\u0275elementStart(4, "input", 4);
        i02.\u0275\u0275listener("input", function TicketSearchComponent_Template_input_input_4_listener($event) {
          return ctx.search($event.target.value);
        });
        i02.\u0275\u0275elementEnd()();
      }
    }, encapsulation: 2 });
  }
};

var TicketDashboardComponent = class _TicketDashboardComponent {
  constructor(ticketService) {
    this.ticketService = ticketService;
    this.tickets = [];
  }
  ngOnInit() {
    this.refresh();
  }
  refresh() {
    this.ticketService.getTickets().subscribe((data) => this.tickets = data);
  }
  handleSearch(results) {
    this.tickets = results;
  }
  static {
    this.\u0275fac = function TicketDashboardComponent_Factory(t) {
      return new (t || _TicketDashboardComponent)(i03.\u0275\u0275directiveInject(TicketService));
    };
  }

import * as i04 from "/@fs/c:/All_Antigravity_Project_Workspace/antigravity-workspace-agentkit/frontend/.angular/cache/17.3.17/vite/deps/@angular_core.js?v=21cc5146";
import * as i22 from "/@fs/c:/All_Antigravity_Project_Workspace/antigravity-workspace-agentkit/frontend/.angular/cache/17.3.17/vite/deps/@angular_forms.js?v=21cc5146";
var TicketFormComponent = class _TicketFormComponent {
  constructor(ticketService) {
    this.ticketService = ticketService;
    this.onCreated = new EventEmitter2();
    this.model = { name: "", description: "", status: "New" };
  }
  submit() {
    if (this.model.name) {
      this.ticketService.createTicket(this.model).subscribe(() => {
        this.onCreated.emit();
        this.model = { name: "", description: "", status: "New" };
      });
    }
  }
  static {
    this.\u0275fac = function TicketFormComponent_Factory(t) {
      return new (t || _TicketFormComponent)(i04.\u0275\u0275directiveInject(TicketService));
    };
  }
  static {

        i05.\u0275\u0275text(11, "Dashboard");

        i05.\u0275\u0275elementEnd();

      }
      if (rf & 2) {
        i05.\u0275\u0275advance(10);
        i05.\u0275\u0275classProp("text-blue-500", ctx.view === "dashboard");
        i05.\u0275\u0275advance(2);
        i05.\u0275\u0275classProp("text-blue-500", ctx.view === "create");

        i05.\u0275\u0275property("ngIf", ctx.view === "create");
      }
    }, dependencies: [i12.NgIf, TicketDashboardComponent, TicketFormComponent], encapsulation: 2 });
  }
};

  (typeof ngDevMode === "undefined" || ngDevMode) && i05.\u0275setClassDebugInfo(AppComponent, { className: "AppComponent", filePath: "src\\app\\app.component.ts", lineNumber: 39 });

// src/app/app.module.ts

  static {

    };
